content_fingerprint: llama cpp lands release b8931 with cuda stream k overhead reduction the ggml org llama cpp project issued release b8931 on april 25 2026 cutting mmq stream k overhead on cuda builds by switching to 32 bit integers for kernel bound computation llama cpp the widely used open source llm inference engine tagged release b8931 on april 25 2026 the headline change is a cuda optimisation for multi query merging mmq stream k code paths using 32 bit integers for the kernel bound computation kbc which should reduce the per kernel overhead on supported nvidia hardware the release ships pre built binaries
